PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER PHYSICAL INSPECTION OF THE PREMISES AT 827 HURON AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART AS FOLLOWS:
